title: Moss themed GUI
body:
### _Hello :)_

This time, I'm posting a green (and gray) GUI I made with mossy cobblestone and mossy stone brick blocks. It wasn't the easiest to make but I managed to do something nice, at least I hope it is !

**Fabric and ModMenu are supported.**

The screenshots are in French but the resource pack is also available in English !

If you have any feedback, you can join my discord server.

_Thanks, see you !_
